modification_notice: Extracted complete Simplified Chinese sentences from the checksum-pinned CISA PDF; excluded headings, page furniture, logos, contact details, external links, and third-party content; no expected text or converter output was used.
known_biases: Official U.S. cyber-safety guidance is not representative of ordinary Taiwan traffic.
The one-page translated guide concentrates account security, phishing, malware, software updates, and password terminology.
Only CISA-authored prose is extracted; headings, logos, contact details, links, and third-party content are excluded.
A maximum of 10% of the final candidate pool may come from this source.
